limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or named vendor/infrastructure partnerships disclosed in the excerpts; only forward-looking qualitative references to potential investment requirements.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named use-case categories (R&D, operational processes, customer-facing tools) are listed but no deployment status, metrics, or specific initiative names are provided; scored 3 accordingly.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and contains a dedicated AI risk factor with named mechanisms (model errors, vendor dependence, data governance, regulatory compliance, competitive pressure); scored 4 for company-specific risk scenarios with described mechanisms, though no quantification or named oversight body is disclosed to warrant a 5.
